settings.title: Cyber Touch AI Lover
settings.subtitle: Intimate Companion From Your Dream
settings.description:
Cyber Touch AI Lover is a groundbreaking mobile app that transforms virtual companionship into a deeply immersive, multi-sensory experience.
 
Designed for those seeking emotional connection, playful interaction, or sensual exploration, the app seamlessly links with our proprietary AI Lover toy—a sleek, responsive device engineered for personalized physical feedback.
settings.feature_1_description: Engage in natural, flowing voice conversations with your AI lover, powered by advanced natural language processing. Choose from customizable personas and watch as the AI adapts to your mood.
settings.feature_2_description: Pair the app with the AI Lover toy via Bluetooth. As your AI companion speaks or reacts, the toy delivers subtle, intuitive vibrations, pulses, or gentle caresses tailored to the conversation's tone.
settings.feature_3_description: Train your AI with voice samples, shared stories, or fantasy scenarios to evolve its responses. All data stays encrypted and secure, ensuring your intimate moments remain private.

settings.title: Download Our App
settings.description: Follow these simple steps to install our app on your device
settings.ios_step1_description: Go to the App Store and search "TestFlight". Download and install the TestFlight app.
settings.ios_step2_title: Scan QR Code and Accept the invitation
settings.ios_step2_description: Scan QR code and enter your email, then you will receive the invitation. Click the link you received. Tap the "View in TestFlight" button. This will open the TestFlight app on your device. Tap "Accept" on the invitation screen.
settings.ios_step3_description: After accepting, you will be taken to the beta app's page within TestFlight. Tap the "Install"/"Update" button to download and install the newest version of the app.
settings.android_step1_description: Enable "install from unknown sources" in your Android's security settings.
settings.android_step2_description: Scan the QR code and click the link to enter our Android Download Page. Click "Download" the APK file.
settings.android_step3_description: Once the download is complete, find the file by tapping the download notification that appears or opening your browser's Downloads list (e.g., in Chrome, tap the three-dot menu). Tap the downloaded APK file. Install it. Tap Install and follow any on-screen instructions to finish.
